title: Notification No.126/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 126/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Commissioner of Customs, Customs House, Kandla; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs (Port Import), Jawaharlal Nehru Customs House, Nhava Sheva, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Maharashtra Eastern Grid Power Transmission Company Limited, ‘Ädani House’, Mithakhali Six Roads, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad-380009 and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number DRI/MZU/CI- 224(PMC)/2013/4488-4491 and 4509-4515, dated 15th May, 2014 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Mumbai. [F No.437/62/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
